caption_gen:
The image shows a dermal proliferation of melanocytic nests. These nests are composed of atypical melanocytes with irregular nuclear contours and prominent nucleoli. There is a surrounding inflammatory infiltrate.

Melanoma.

The epidermis shows mild atypia. The dermis contains a dense proliferation of atypical melanocytes with irregular nuclear contours and prominent nucleoli, arranged in nests and sheets.

Melanoma.

The image shows a lesion with irregular pigment distribution and atypical melanocytes.
Melanoma.

The image shows a dense proliferation of spindle cells with eosinophilic cytoplasm and elongated nuclei. There is a prominent vascular network.

Melanoma.

The image shows a dense proliferation of atypical melanocytes infiltrating the dermis. There is no evidence of a benign nevus.

The image shows a dermal proliferation of atypical melanocytes.

The image shows a dense proliferation of atypical melanocytes infiltrating the dermis. There is also an associated band-like arrangement of collagen in the upper dermis.
Melanoma.

The H&E image shows a dermal proliferation of atypical melanocytes with irregular nuclear contours and prominent nucleoli.

Melanoma.

The H&E image shows a dense proliferation of atypical spindle cells with elongated nuclei and prominent nucleoli, arranged in fascicles. There is also a prominent inflammatory infiltrate.

The H&E image shows a dense proliferation of atypical melanocytes with irregular nuclear contours and prominent nucleoli. There is a lack of maturation and significant atypia.
